title: Community bank group launches new ad campaign targeting stablecoin reward language risks

title: MassPay taps Coinbase to expand stablecoin payouts
message_html: MassPay taps Coinbase to expand stablecoin payouts ...
snippet: MassPay taps Coinbase to add USDC-powered cross-border payouts, betting stablecoin rails will cut costs and speed up settlement for businesses paying globally.

title: Digital Asset lands $355M as a16z doubles down on Wall Street blockchain rails
message_html: Digital Asset lands $355M as a16z doubles down on Wall Street blockchain rails ...
snippet: Digital Asset raised $355M in an a16z‑led round at a $2B valuation, extending a Wall Street‑backed funding run as banks ramp up pilots on its Canton Network blockchain.
